title: Butane Operator Helm Chart Values
description: Configuration values for the Butane Operator Helm chart.

global.title: Global Configuration
global.description: Global settings shared across all subcharts. Additional properties are allowed so parent umbrella charts can pass arbitrary global values through Helm.

imageRegistry.title: Image Registry
imageRegistry.description: Global container image registry override. When set, all images will be pulled from this registry.

imagePullSecrets.title: Image Pull Secrets
imagePullSecrets.description: Global list of image pull secrets for authenticating to private registries.

nodeSelector.title: Node Selector
nodeSelector.description: Global node selector applied to all pods.

tolerations.title: Tolerations
tolerations.description: Global tolerations applied to all pods.

kubevirtNamespace.title: KubeVirt Namespace
kubevirtNamespace.description: Global KubeVirt namespace. Used by subcharts that deploy into the KubeVirt namespace.

namespace.title: Namespace
namespace.description: Kubernetes namespace where the Butane Operator will be deployed.

replicas.title: Replicas
replicas.description: Number of Butane Operator pod replicas.

image.title: Image
image.description: Container image settings for the Butane Operator.

repository.title: Repository
repository.description: Container image repository for the Butane Operator.

tag.title: Tag
tag.description: Container image tag for the Butane Operator.

rbacProxy.title: RBAC Proxy
rbacProxy.description: Configuration for the kube-rbac-proxy sidecar container.

image.title: Image
image.description: Container image settings for the kube-rbac-proxy sidecar.

repository.title: Repository
repository.description: Container image repository for the kube-rbac-proxy.

tag.title: Tag
tag.description: Container image tag for the kube-rbac-proxy.

resources.title: Resource Requirements
resources.description: CPU and memory resource requests and limits.

limits.title: Resource Limits
limits.description: Maximum resources the container can use.

nodeSelector.title: Node Selector
nodeSelector.description: Node selector for scheduling the Butane Operator pods.

tolerations.title: Tolerations
tolerations.description: Tolerations for the Butane Operator pods.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether this component is enabled. Controlled by the parent chart.
